features: Presented in beautiful packaging that can be re-used
300ml shower crème, 300ml crème bath bubbles, 130ml hand & body lotion, 130ml crème body wash, 100g soap, 100g bath soak crystals and a body polisher
Baylis & Harding's Tropical Paradise fragrance which is delicate yet indulgent
Floral keepsake box with recyclable cardboard wrap band
description: Product Description This beautiful keepsake box contains 300ml shower crème, 300ml crème bath bubbles, 130ml hand & body lotion, 130ml crème body wash, 100g soap, 100g bath soak crystals and a body polisher, for the ultimate pampering experience. Influenced by catwalk, interior and lifestyle trends, this year’s design partners a beautifully executed tropical floral print with luxe foils for femininity with a modern twist. A seductive colour palette of fuscia pink and teal green are elevated against a rich velvety grey back drop to give this collection the luxury edge perfect for any floral loving fashionista. The Boudoire Collection is our most feminine and indulgent collection. This Tropical Paradise with top notes of banana, peach and orange blossom is delicate yet indulgent, modern, and sumptuous. Ingredients SHOWER CREME: Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Glycol Distearate, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Phenoxyethanol, Peg-150 Distearate, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Disodium Edta, Citric Acid, Benzophenone-4.BATH BUBBLES: Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Glycol Distearate, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Phenoxyethanol, Peg-150 Distearate, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Disodium Edta, Citric Acid, Benzophenone-4.HAND & BODY LOTION: Aqua (Water, Eau), Cetearyl Alcohol, Paraffinum Liquidum (Mineral Oil), Stearic Acid, Glyceryl Stearate, Glycerin, Peg-100 Stearate, Phenoxyethanol, Caprylyl Glycol, Carbomer, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Hydroxide, Benzophenone-4, Benzaldehyde.CLEANSING SOAP: Sodium Palmate, Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Palm Kernelate, Glycerin, Sodium Chloride, Parfum (Fragrance), Tetrasodium Edta, Tetrasodium Etidronate, Titanium Dioxide (Ci 77891).BODY WASH: Aqua (Water, Eau), Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Glycol Distearate, Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Phenoxyethanol, Peg-150 Distearate, Parfum (Fragrance), Sodium Benzoate, Potassium Sorbate, Disodium Edta, Citric Acid, Benzophenone-4.BATH SOAK CRYSTALS: Sodium Chloride, Parfum (Fragrance), Benzophenone-4. Directions Shower Crème/Crème Body Wash/Soap - Lather And Rinse. Crème Bath Bubbles - Pour Into Bath Under Warm Running Water. Hand & Body Lotion - Massage Gently Into Skin Until Fully Absorbed. Bath Soak Crystals - Sprinkle Into Bath Under Warm Running Water. Safety Warning WARNING: AVOID CONTACT WITH EYES. IF PRODUCT GETS IN THE EYES RINSE IMMEDIATELY WITH CLEAN WARM WATER. IF SKIN IRRITATION OCCURS DISCONTINUE USE. IF IRRITATION PERSISTS CONSULT YOUR DOCTOR. Manufacturer Contact Information Baylis & Harding Plc, B98 7AS, England. RP. MSL, Suite 5385, 27 Upper Pembroke St, Dublin, IE. See more
